title: Energy Dashboard
description: This project combines IEA oil import/export data with global EV sales figures across 50+ countries spanning 1971–2023 for oil trade and 2010–2030 for EV sales. Forecasts extend through 2035 using ARIMA and logistic S-curve models.

title: NBA Call-Up Predictor
description: full-stack system using an automated SportsRadar API ETL pipeline to aggregate player statistics, official contract logs, and team rosters across 5 seasons to predict G-Leagues Player's call up rate to a NBA teams.

title: NourishOne - Find your food pantry
description: NourishOne is a static React web app that helps people in the DC, Maryland, and Virginia region find food assistance. It aggregates 737 verified food pantry locations into a searchable, filterable, map-driven interface for Donors, Food Pantry, and Volunteers

title: Baron or Dragons? League of Legends
description: Dragons or Baron? Modeling Objective Control and Win Probability in League of Legends, understanding how different objectives influence the probability of winning can provide insight into effective gameplay strategies.
